title.en: In spotlight but shunning limelight - Olise's unique rise to top
title.zh-CN: 在聚光灯下避开聚光灯--Olise独一无二的拔得头筹

summary.en: A footballer who dislikes too much media attention, but Michael Olise might not have much choice if he carries on his World Cup heroics.
summary.zh-CN: 一个不喜欢太多媒体关注的足球运动员，但如果迈克尔·奥利斯继续他的世界杯英雄事迹，他可能别无选择。

title.en: Brazil going out? Chris Sutton predicts World Cup's last-16 matches
title.zh-CN: 巴西出局？克里斯·萨顿预测世界杯的最后16场比赛

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the last-16 ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台的足球专家克里斯·萨顿（ Chris Sutton ）对2026年世界杯的最后16场比赛进行了预测，其中包括英格兰对墨西哥的比赛。

title.en: Why Europe's top clubs are eyeing Morocco's teenage sensation Bouaddi
title.zh-CN: 为什么欧洲顶级俱乐部正在关注摩洛哥的青少年轰动Bouaddi

summary.en: After lighting up the 2022 World Cup Morocco are once again shining on the global stage - but this time they have teenage sensation Ayyoub Bouaddi in their ranks.
summary.zh-CN: 在点亮2022年世界杯之后，摩洛哥再次在全球舞台上熠熠生辉，但这一次，他们的队伍中出现了青春期的Ayyoub Bouaddi。

title.en: From one to 16 - ranking every team left in the World Cup
title.zh-CN: 从1到16 -对世界杯剩下的每支球队进行排名

summary.en: BBC Sport ranks the 16 teams left in the World Cup. Do Argentina deserve to be in the top three? Should Norway be higher? What about England's position?
summary.zh-CN: BBC体育对世界杯剩下的16支球队进行了排名。阿根廷是否应该进入前三名？挪威应该更高吗？英格兰的立场如何？

title.en: Arias strike sends Colombia into last 16 with victory over Ghana
title.zh-CN: 阿里亚斯罢工使哥伦比亚进入最后16名，战胜加纳

summary.en: Jhon Arias scores the only goal of the game as Colombia become the last team to book their place in the last 16 following a 1-0 win over Ghana in Kansas City.
summary.zh-CN: 乔恩·阿里亚斯（ Jhon Arias ）在堪萨斯城以1比0战胜加纳后，成为最后一支在过去16场比赛中预定位置的球队，这是比赛的唯一进球。

title.en: Murals, flags and beef dishes - Messi mania takes hold in Miami
title.zh-CN: 壁画、旗帜和牛肉菜肴：迈阿密的梅西狂热

summary.en: Lionel Messi's World Cup goals roadshow continued with his seventh of the tournament for Argentina against Cape Verde - and delighted the fans who were in Miami to see their hero.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）的世界杯进球路演继续进行，在阿根廷对佛得角的比赛中排名第七，他很高兴在迈阿密的球迷看到了他们的英雄。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 27
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星27号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

summary.en: All the news from the World Cup plus Neil Lennon, Robbie Neilson, Craig McLeish and more
summary.zh-CN: 来自世界杯以及Neil Lennon、Robbie Neilson、Craig McLeish等人的所有新闻

title.en: Canada facing Morocco in World Cup last-16 tie LIVE!
title.zh-CN: 加拿大队在世界杯最后16场比赛中对阵摩洛哥队，并列直播！

title.en: Carra: Tuchel's created right-back problem with 'bizarre decision'
title.zh-CN: 卡拉：图切尔用“奇怪的决定”制造了右后卫问题

summary.en: Jamie Carragher believes England boss Thomas Tuchel is to blame for his side's right-back issue at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 杰米·卡拉格（ Jamie Carragher ）认为，英格兰主帅托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）应对他的球队在世界杯上的右后卫问题

title.en: England receive hostile welcome at Mexico City hotel
title.zh-CN: 英格兰在墨西哥城酒店受到热烈欢迎

title.en: Mexico will come out swinging as Tuchel faces more selection headaches
title.zh-CN: 随着Tuchel面临更多的选择难题，墨西哥将摆脱困境

summary.en: England will face their biggest test of the World Cup so far when they take on Mexico at the Azteca Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队将在阿兹特克体育场迎战墨西哥队时，将面临迄今为止最大的世界杯考验。

title.en: Klopp to hold talks over Germany job after Nagelsmann's exit
title.zh-CN: 纳格斯曼离职后，克洛普将就德国就业问题举行会谈

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp is set to hold talks with officials from the German FA in New York next week about becoming the national team boss, according to Sky in Germany.
summary.zh-CN: 据德国天空电视台报道，尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）将于下周在纽约与德国足协官员就成为国家队老板举行会谈。

title.en: World Cup 2026 power rankings: undisputed No 1, co-hosts surge and giants fall
title.zh-CN: 2026年世界杯电力排名：无可争议的第一，房屋管家激增，巨人陨落

summary.en: We assess the standing of the nations who played in the tournament’s last 32 before the next round of games beginsLes Bleus look unstoppable – all six of our judges ranked them No 1. Sweden did their...

title.en: BBC offers 'Stay Up or Catch Up' for England v Mexico

summary.en: The BBC will be launching a special 'Stay Up or Catch Up' offer for its live coverage of England's game against Mexico at the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Rice likely to be available for England v Mexico

summary.en: Declan Rice is likely to be available to start England's World Cup tie against Mexico despite an ongoing injury issue.

title.en: England fan tickets for Mexico on resale for up to £26K

summary.en: Tickets originally bought by England fans for the World Cup last-16 game against Mexico are relisted for thousands of pounds on Fifa's official resale portal.

title.en: After World Cup goals are last year's signings finally set to deliver for Newcastle?

summary.en: Anthony Elanga and Yoane Wissa both struggled in their first season at Newcastle, but five goals between at the World Cup them suggest things will be different next term.

title.en: 'I decided last minute!' - Salah on Panenka penalty

summary.en: Mo Salah explains it was a last-minute decision to "Panenka" his penalty for Egypt after they beat Australia in a shootout to progress to the last 16 of the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Watch the full shootout as Egypt hold nerve to make World Cup last 16

summary.en: Egypt defeat Australia on penalties to claim their first ever win in the World Cup knockout stage, and make it through to the last 16.

title.en: 'History for the Pharaohs' - Egypt celebrate after winning shootout

summary.en: Egypt celebrate as they win a World Cup knockout match for the first time after beating Australia 4-2 on penalties in Dallas to reach the last 16.

title.en: Ashour heads Egypt into lead against Australia

summary.en: Emam Ashour heads Egypt into the lead against Australia in their 2026 World Cup round of 32 match in Dallas.

title.en: 'You can't breathe' - what is it like playing at altitude?

summary.en: BBC pundits Rachel Corsie and Lucas Leiva explain their experiences of playing football at altitude, ahead of England's game at Estadio Azteca against Mexico which sits 2,240 metres above sea level.

title.en: Portugal through to last 16 after dramatic victory over Croatia

summary.en: Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 with goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Goncalo Ramos after a chaotic second-half in Toronto to set up a last 16 tie with Iberian rivals Spain.

title.en: The friends who drove from Ghana to the World Cup

summary.en: Six fans of the Black Stars are living proof of how football can drive supporters to extreme lengths to follow their team.

title.en: Ex-Spurs boss Postecoglou takes over at Ronaldo's Al-Nassr

summary.en: Former Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou is appointed as head coach of Al-Nassr in the Saudi Pro League - where he will manage Cristiano Ronaldo.
